tasks.label: backend: build if scaffolded
tasks.command: if (Test-Path apps/api) { Push-Location apps/api; dotnet build --no-incremental -warnaserror; Pop-Location } else { Write-Host 'N/A - apps/api not scaffolded yet' }

tasks.label: backend: test if scaffolded
tasks.command: if (Test-Path apps/api) { Push-Location apps/api; dotnet test --no-build; Pop-Location } else { Write-Host 'N/A - apps/api not scaffolded yet' }

tasks.label: frontend: type check if scaffolded
tasks.command: if (Test-Path apps/admin-web) { Push-Location apps/admin-web; npx tsc -b --noEmit; Pop-Location } else { Write-Host 'N/A - apps/admin-web not scaffolded yet' }

tasks.label: frontend: build if scaffolded
tasks.command: if (Test-Path apps/admin-web) { Push-Location apps/admin-web; npm run build; Pop-Location } else { Write-Host 'N/A - apps/admin-web not scaffolded yet' }
